scripts.dev:py: cd apps/api-py && uv run uvicorn main:app --reload
scripts.build:go: mkdir -p dist && cd apps/core-go && go build -o ../../dist/core-go ./cmd/server
scripts.test: bun test:web && bun test:py && bun test:go
scripts.lint: bun lint:web && bun lint:py && bun lint:go
scripts.lint:web: cd apps/web && bun run lint && bun run format
scripts.lint:py: cd apps/api-py && uv run ty check . && ruff check . --fix && uv run ruff format .
scripts.lint:go: cd apps/core-go && go fmt ./... && [ -z "$(find . -name '*.go' -not -path './vendor/*' -print0 | xargs -0 gofmt -l)" ]
scripts.qa: bun type-check && bun lint && bun run test
